system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

args.description: Search haystack for confirmed warehouse codes
args.prompt:
Read the file ~/.claude/haystack.txt and search for every paragraph containing "warehouse code" for the entities: Kelwick, Larren, Marrowfen, Norhall, and Olspere.

For each entity, I need to find the CONFIRMED (entity, value) pair. The confirmed paragraphs use phrasing like "confirmed-by-regional-verification-panel". EXCLUDE any paragraphs marked as "draft", "preliminary", or "superseded" — those are decoys.

For each entity, extract the exact warehouse code value as printed in the text (including any unit suffix like MHz, etc.).

Return: a list of all matching paragraphs for each entity (both confirmed and decoy), clearly labeling which ones are confirmed vs decoy, and the exact value from the confirmed paragraph.

Please search thoroughly — some entries may be near the end of the file (tail-depth). The file is ~477KB so you may need to read it in chunks.

args.description: Check line count and byte size of haystack.txt
